notes: Re-measured on 2026-04-23. Prior baseline (107s / 19112 tests / 46abf4f2 / 2026-04-13) was stale -- main accumulated ~1800 tests across upstream merges while the baseline stayed pinned. Per-test cost is 6.26ms (current) vs 5.60ms (old baseline); the fixed +10s threshold fired on mechanical scale growth rather than a real slowdown. Tolerance raised to +15s to absorb xdist variance at the new scale without masking genuine regressions.
